blocks.label: Simple Definition
blocks.text: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the ability of a computer or machine to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

blocks.label: Technical Definition
blocks.text: AI is a branch of Computer Science that develops intelligent systems capable of learning, reasoning, problem-solving, decision-making, and understanding data.

blocks.heading: Why do we need AI? Because humans cannot always:
items: Process huge amounts of data quickly
Make instant decisions in every situation
blocks.note: AI helps automate these tasks efficiently.

blocks.heading: Real-Life Examples
items: Google Maps → Finds the best route

items.label: AI Program
items.text: Learns from data, improves over time. Example: ChatGPT.

blocks.heading: Key Points
items: AI can learn, reason, and make decisions.
AI is used in almost every industry today.

interviewQA.question: What is Artificial Intelligence?
interviewQA.answer: AI is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

examQuestions.question: Explain Artificial Intelligence with suitable examples.

sections.heading: Goals of Artificial Intelligence
sections.intro: The goal of AI is to create machines that can perform tasks requiring human intelligence.

items.title: Learning
items.text: AI learns from data and improves over time.
items.example: Netflix recommends better movies based on your watching history.

items.title: Reasoning
items.text: AI uses logic to solve problems and make decisions.
items.example: Chess-playing AI chooses the best move.

items.title: Problem Solving
items.text: AI finds the best solution to a given problem.
items.example: Google Maps finds the shortest route.

items.title: Decision Making
items.text: AI selects the best option from multiple choices.
items.example: Banks use AI to approve or reject loans.

items.title: Perception
items.text: AI understands information from images, videos, speech, or sensors.

items.title: Automation
items.text: AI performs repetitive tasks automatically with minimal human intervention.
items.example: Customer support chatbots answer common questions.

blocks.heading: Key Points
items: AI aims to make machines intelligent.
AI learns from experience and data.
AI helps solve problems and make decisions.
AI is widely used in daily life.

interviewQA.question: What is the main goal of AI?
interviewQA.answer: To develop machines that can perform tasks requiring human intelligence.

interviewQA.question: Name any four goals of AI.
interviewQA.answer: Learning, Reasoning, Problem Solving, Decision Making.

examQuestions.question: What are the goals of Artificial Intelligence?
Explain the major goals of AI with examples.

quiz.question: Which is NOT a goal of AI?
Google Maps mainly demonstrates which AI goal?
